name: Cajun Tostada with Tomato Cumin Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Coat the chicken breasts evenly with Cajun blackening powder.
2. Heat 3 tablespoons of vegetable oil in a large cast iron skillet over high heat until very hot.
3. Add the coated chicken breasts to the skillet and fry for 2 minutes on each side or until cooked through. Remove the chicken and cut it into diagonal strips. Set aside.
4. In another large skillet, heat 1/4 cup of oil over medium-high heat until crisp. Drain the fried tortillas on paper towels and set them aside.
5. In a medium bowl, combine shredded lettuce and crumbled feta cheese.
6. Sprinkle the Tomato Cumin Dressing evenly over the ingredients in the bowl and toss well to combine.
7. Spread spiced refried beans onto each of the fried tortillas.
8. Place the tossed lettuce mixture on top of the refried beans, followed by sliced chicken strips and crumbled feta cheese.
9. Garnish with 2 avocado slices before serving.
